request.description:
使用此模式，用户可以自定义收银台。

直连模式分2步

1、通过收银台模式获取提交网关和平台单号。

收银台响应信息中的 host 参数即为提交网关（pkr_h2h_submit_gateway)

2、向网关发起提交。

注意：支付成功与否取决于回调结果

response.name: 代收（直连模式）

request.description:
1、callback_payin 商户提交代收订单时的notify_url
2、商户收到请求后，请返回success，可能重复发送多次，请全部返回success

1、callback_payout 商户提交代付订单时的notify_url
2、商户收到请求后，请返回success，可能重复发送多次，请全部返回success

item.description:
一、协议规则
1、接口使用 HTTP 协议，商户和平台以及平台和商户之间都是 POST 请求。
2、平台和商户之间：Content-Type:application/x-www-form-urlencoded
3、平台统一使用 UTF-8 编码格式

二、签名算法
1、针对发送或接收的需签名的数据为集合 M，将集合的参数按照参数名 ASCII 码从小到大排序（字典序），使用 URL 键值对的格式（即 key1=value1&key2=value2…）拼接成字符串stringA。
特别注意以下重要规则:
1）参数名 ASCII 码从小到大排序（字典序）
2）空值不参与签名
3）参数名区分大小写
4）验证调用返回或平台主动通知签名时，传递的 sign 参数不参与签名，将生成的签名与该sign 值进行校验。
2、在 stringA 最后拼接上 key（即 stringA+“&key=“+私钥）得到 stringSignTemp 字符串,并对 stringSignTemp 进行 MD5 运算,再将得到的字符串转为小写，得到 sign 的值。

三、请求返回的code说明

值 描述
0 成功
1 失败
2 mchId 错误
3 账户不存在
4 账户状态异常
5 签名错误
6 订单已存在
7 订单不存在
8 权限不足
9 余额不足
10 金额错误
11 通道维护中
12 货币不存在
13 通道不存在
15 通道失败
16 IP 错误，需联系客服加白名单
17 银行不存在
其他 未知状态，请机器人查询或调用查询接口查询

四、订单状态status说明

值 描述
0 待支付
1 支付成功
2 支付失败

五、注意事项

1、回调状态标记：

当商户收到我方回调时，请返回：success(表示成功，非字符串“success”)，我方将标记成功，并不再回调；其他将视为失败，我方可能会再次回调，请注意逻辑判断。
2、订单号不能重复

代收单号或代付单号请保持唯一，我方未判断是否重复。
3、代收回调

代收回调数据包含了订单金额和支付金额，请参照支付金额进行业务处理。
4、数据清理

我方会对未支付的订单数据定期清理，即每日凌晨清理 20 天前未支付的订单数据。

六、测试信息

mchId：1000

key：eb6080dbc8dc429ab86a1cd1c337975d

host：sandbox.wpay.one

代收订单提单后，大约10秒左右会自动回调支付成功

代付订单提单后，根据商户单号最后一个数字判断，如果是奇数回调支付失败，如果是偶数回调支付成功，如果没有数字回调支付成功

request.description:
1. Standard UPI Channel order replenishment results will be displayed in the order replenishment group

  2. BANK API Channel and advanced UPI Channel directly return order replenishment results.

response.name: India UTR order replenishment
PayIn（H2C)

request.description:
Using this mode, users can customize the checkout page.

H2H requires two steps:

1、Obtain the submission gateway and platform order number via H2C mode.

The host parameter in the cashier's response information is the submission gateway (pkr_h2h_submit_gateway).

2、Initiate the submission to the gateway.

Note: Payment success depends on the callback result.

request.description:
1. callback_payin is the notify_url when the merchant submits the payment order
  2. After the merchant receives the request, please return success. It may be sent repeatedly, please return success for all requests

1. callback_payout is the notify_url when the merchant submits the payment order
  2. After the merchant receives the request, please return success. It may be sent repeatedly, please return success for all requests

item.description:
一、Protocol Rules

  1. The interface uses HTTP protocol, and POST requests are used between merchants and platforms, and between platforms and merchants.

  2. Between platforms and merchants: Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

  3. The platform uniformly uses UTF-8 encoding format

二、Signature Algorithm

  1. For the data to be signed that is sent or received, set M is used. The parameters of the set are sorted from small to large according to the ASCII code of the parameter name (lexicographic order), and concatenated into a string stringA using the format of URL key-value pairs (i.e. key1=value1&key2=value2…).
    Pay special attention to the following important rules:

    1. Parameter name ASCII codes are sorted from small to large (lexicographic order)
    2. Empty values ​​do not participate in the signature
    3. Parameter names are case sensitive
    4. When the verification call returns or the platform actively notifies the signature, the passed sign parameter does not participate in the signature, and the generated signature is verified with the sign value.

  2. Concatenate key (i.e. stringA+“&key=“+private key) to the end of stringA to obtain the stringSignTemp, perform MD5 operation on stringSignTemp, and then convert the resulting string to lowercase to obtain the value of sign.

三、The "code" description returned by the request

value description
0 success
1 failed
2 mchId error
3 account does not exists
4 account abnormal
5 sign error
6 order already exists
7 order does not exists
8 no permission
9 Insufficient balance
10 Wrong amount
11 Channel maintenance
12 Currency does not exist
13 Channel does not exist
15 Channel failed
16 ip error
17 bank does not exist
other the status is unknown. please use the query interface or the robot to query.

四、order "status" description

value description
0 pending
1 payment success
2 payment failed

五、Things to note

  1. Callback status mark:
    When the merchant receives our callback, please return: success (indicates success, not the string "success"), we will mark the success and no longer call back; others will be considered failures, we may call back again, please pay attention to logical judgment.

  2. Order number cannot be repeated
    The collection order number or payment order number should be kept unique, we have not judged whether it is repeated.

  3. Collection and collection
    The collection and collection data includes the order amount and the payment amount. Please refer to the payment amount for business processing.

  4. Data cleaning
    We will regularly clean up the unpaid order data, that is, clean up the unpaid order data 20 days ago at dawn every day.

六、Test information

mchId：1000

key：eb6080dbc8dc429ab86a1cd1c337975d

host：sandbox.wpay.one

payin callback
After the order is successfully created, the payment success callback will be automatically issued in about 10 seconds

payout callback
After the order is successfully created, based on the last digit of the merchant's order number, if it is an odd number, the callback payment will fail, if it is an even number, the callback payment will be successful, if there is no number, the callback payment will be successful.
